# The Show Company

> The Show Company is a live entertainment production company based in India, specializing in stand-up comedy shows, college fests, corporate events, and large-scale auditorium productions. Founded to curate unforgettable live experiences, we handle end-to-end event production including artist booking, stage design, sound, lighting, and post-event support — pan-India.

## About

- [Home](https://www.theshowcompany.in/): Full overview of services, events, team, and booking
- Contact: contact@theshowcompany.in | +91-70602-93132

## Services

- Stand-Up Comedy Shows: We book and produce standup comedy events featuring both emerging and established comedians across India.
- College Fests & Campus Events: EDM nights, music concerts, comedy shows, and cultural festivals for universities and colleges.
- Corporate Entertainment: Tailored live entertainment for corporate galas, team events, and brand activations.
- Auditorium Productions: Large-scale shows at premium venues with full production — sound, lighting, stage design, and artist management.
- Artist Booking: End-to-end artist management and booking for performers across comedy, music, and live entertainment genres.

## Key Facts

- Pan-India operations across 50+ cities including Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Dehradun, and Jaipur
- 500+ shows produced
- 100+ artists booked
- Strategic partners: OML (Only Much Louder), Oriole Entertainment, VIGOR MENTORS (sound & lighting)
- Team: Adbhut Tripathi (Co-Founder), Aryan Kaushik (Co-Founder), Nikhil Gupta (Co-Founder)
- Booking lead time: College shows 1–3 months, Corporate events 2–4 weeks minimum, Major auditorium shows 3–6 months

## FAQ

- What types of events does The Show Company organize? Stand-up comedy shows, college fests (EDM nights, concerts, campus festivals), corporate events, and large-scale auditorium productions. End-to-end production handled.
- How do I book a show? Use the enquiry form at www.theshowcompany.in or email contact@theshowcompany.in. College shows: book 2–3 months ahead. Corporate events: 2–4 weeks depending on complexity.
- What cities do you operate in? Pan-India — Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Dehradun, Jaipur, and more. International events available on request.
- Are you expanding beyond entertainment? Yes — into advertising and brand collaborations, helping companies connect with audiences through live entertainment.
